site.title: Alex Esposito — Data & Analytics Consultant
site.description: Data & Analytics consultant specializing in Salesforce, Power BI, CRM data quality, and automation. A portfolio of work delivered across revenue, CRM, and process mining.

hero.titleAfterMain: into clear, reliable insights for management
hero.description: Data & Analytics consultant at Accenture. I work with revenue teams on Salesforce implementations, Power BI cockpits, data-quality programs and automations. This site is a portfolio of that work.

services.title: Four disciplines, one thread: defensible decisions.
services.description: The work covers implementation, analytics, data quality, and process mining — often in combination on the same account.

items.title: Salesforce Analytics
items.body: Pipeline models, forecasting, stage audits, and custom reporting that scales beyond the standard Salesforce toolkit.

items.title: Power BI
items.body: Executive cockpits, semantic models, and DAX that answer the questions on the agenda — not just those in the data.

items.title: CRM Data Quality
items.body: I quantify the chaos, define an index, assign owners, and build the automations that keep the CRM clean in production.

items.title: Revenue Ops Enablement
items.body: From spreadsheets to governed pipelines — so the numbers that end up in the Boardroom are reliable and the team gets its weeks back.

items.title: Process Mining
items.body: Discover how processes actually run — not just what the manual says. Event-log analysis with Fluxicon Disco to surface bottlenecks, rework loops, and variants that erode your margin.

demo.title: A dashboard designed around decisions, not just charts.
demo.description: Filter by region to see how a well-modeled pipeline shows where revenue actually comes from — and where it silently stalls.

insight.label: Insight
insight.apac: APAC pipeline grew 17% but win rate is down 1.4pp. Stage-skipping on Enterprise deals correlates with slippage — worth a coaching moment.
insight.emea: EMEA leads closed-won growth. Win rate up on mid-market; Enterprise cycle stretched to 91 days — expected given Q1 renewal load.
insight.amer: AMER pipeline steady; stalled bucket grew 12% WoW. Recommend re-engagement plays on the 14 deals >45d without activity.
insight.all: Pipeline up 12.5% MoM across regions. €3.8M is flagged as stalled — 62% of it sits with 9 reps who missed activity SLAs this month.

demo.disclaimer: Figures illustrative. Real engagements ship production dashboards with governed data and signed-off definitions.

projectsPreview.title: Case studies, not screenshots.
projectsPreview.description: Each engagement written up as the sponsor would tell it: problem, data, solution, impact.

process.title: A 6-week shape, fixed scope.
process.description: Most of the work here followed the same shape: designed to finish, defined deliverables, weekly cadence, handovers the team owns.

steps.title: Decision mapping
steps.body: I interview sponsors, map all questions the deliverable must answer, and agree on the success metric before touching any data.

steps.title: Data contract
steps.body: I profile source systems, quantify quality, and lock in definitions with whoever owns the upstream fields.

steps.title: Build & test
steps.body: Incremental models, governed measures, and unit tests on every KPI. Nothing goes to production without a test.

steps.title: Operational handover
steps.body: Final training, DAX/SFDC documentation, and setup of daily rituals to make the team autonomous.

chatBanner.title: Have a Salesforce account or Power BI dashboard no one uses?
chatBanner.description: Let's talk about how to turn them into a governance tool your team will actually open every morning.
chatBanner.cta: Talk with the bot or book a call

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to chat about Data & Analytics? Send me a message.
contact.availability: Available for consulting and freelance projects

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js and ❤️ in Rome.
